name: slider
title: Slider
description: Continuous or stepped scalar input built on Radix, with optional marks.

props.name: value / defaultValue
props.description: Controlled/uncontrolled thumb values (array — supports multi-thumb ranges).

props.name: showMarks
props.description: Render a dot at each step interval.

props.name: markLabels
props.description: Labels shown under specific mark values.

notes: Foundational form primitive; ported from petals_ui with brand-pink/brand-teal variants removed.
